ValidationRule.description: Recruiting leads can only have 1 value selected for unit relevance
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, RecordType.Id ="012b0000000cObz",
( IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "BLC"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "BY"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "GBUS"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "GBCH"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "GCH"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "HBC"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "HYS"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "KNO"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "MA"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "ON"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "SC"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "SE"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "VH"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "SVH"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "CY"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "XB"),1,0) )<>1 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please select one unit relevance for a recruiting campaign. (CAM001)
